summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. No shared canonical was selected because the job is an inventory shard, not a dedupe cluster. Security-sensitive PRs were routed to central security handling; open non-security PRs were kept as independent review items; the already-closed PR was kept closed.

actions.reason: Open non-security PR with useful focused code and passing evidence; no inventory-shard close or merge action is allowed.
Open non-security PR with focused implementation and tests; no duplicate/supersede evidence in this shard.
Already closed; preserve as historical superseded context only.
Draft maintainer-owned hardening PR with useful focused work, but no close/merge path in this plan job.
Security-boundary WhatsApp group-management capability must be quarantined to central OpenClaw security handling.
Open contributor PR appears useful and reviewable, but this plan job cannot merge and should not close it.
MCP catalog projection/request-boundary hardening is explicitly marked security-sensitive in preflight and must be routed centrally.
Open non-security UI PR is independent and still waiting on author/maintainer review; no low-signal close is allowed.
Open active contributor PR with substantial useful implementation and proof; keep as independent maintainer-review item.
Draft maintainer-owned focused hardening PR; keep as an independent review item rather than closing or merging.
